CancelBatchJobExecution.description: Grants permission to cancel the execution of a batch job

CreateApplication.description: Grants permission to create an application

CreateDataSetExportTask.description: Grants permission to create a data set export task

CreateDataSetImportTask.description: Grants permission to create a data set import task

CreateDeployment.description: Grants permission to create a deployment

CreateEnvironment.description: Grants permission to Create an environment

DeleteApplication.description: Grants permission to delete an application

DeleteApplicationFromEnvironment.description: Grants permission to delete an application from a runtime environment

DeleteEnvironment.description: Grants permission to delete a runtime environment

GetApplication.description: Grants permission to retrieve an application

GetApplicationVersion.description: Grants permission to retrieve an application version

GetBatchJobExecution.description: Grants permission to retrieve a batch job execution

GetDataSetDetails.description: Grants permission to retrieve data set details

GetDataSetExportTask.description: Grants permission to export a data set at the specified S3 location

GetDataSetImportTask.description: Grants permission to retrieve a data set import task

GetDeployment.description: Grants permission to retrieve a deployment

GetEnvironment.description: Grants permission to retrieve a runtime environment

GetSignedBluinsightsUrl.description: Grants permission to create a signed Bluinsights url

ListApplicationVersions.description: Grants permission to list the versions of an application

ListBatchJobDefinitions.description: Grants permission to list batch job definitions

ListBatchJobExecutions.description: Grants permission to list executions for a batch job

ListBatchJobRestartPoints.description: Grants permission to retrieve a batch job execution

ListDataSetExportHistory.description: Grants permission to list data set export history

ListDataSetImportHistory.description: Grants permission to list data set import history

ListDataSets.description: Grants permission to list data sets

ListEngineVersions.description: Grants permission to list engine versions

ListEnvironments.description: Grants permission to list runtime environments

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a resource

StartApplication.description: Grants permission to start an application

StartBatchJob.description: Grants permission to start a batch job

StopApplication.description: Grants permission to stop an application

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag a resource

UpdateApplication.description: Grants permission to update an application

UpdateEnvironment.description: Grants permission to update a runtime environment

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by a tag key and value pair that is allowed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by a tag key and value pair of a resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by a list of tag keys that are allowed in the request
